title: User Added to Administrative Group
description: Detects a user being added to the local/domain Administrators group (4732/4728), a privilege-escalation indicator.
author: SOC Team

qradar.rule_name: SOC-014: User Added to Administrative Group

aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, username AS added_by_context, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4732%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4728%' ) AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Administrators%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Domain Admins%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%S-1-5-32-544%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-512%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 5 MINUTES
